translated: Whether it is club activities, work, or job hunting,
I know things can be tough. In times like those, I hope you can use ProSeka's stories
to take a little breather, or listen to lots of our songs.
It would make me so happy if they could become a source of strength or healing for everyone.
That is...
what I was thinking.
When you lack confidence... well, it was the same for Shizuku. Shizuku,
right?
She was happy to pass the Grand Fleur audition, but she did not know
what she needed to do to have the strength to be worthy of co-starring with Hagiyama.
Being in that state of not knowing,
and then having the actual performance approach... that is terrifying, right?
Knowing that you are lacking something,
and having to smash through the wall right in front of you...
it is just so scary.
That lack of confidence,
and that fear... it was one of the scenes I really empathized with.
It really was.
And then, this part.
Um,
after seeing Hagiyama-chan's performance,
not wanting to lose to anyone, or give in...
Shizuku,
she felt that.
When Hagiyama-chan asked Shizuku what she was thinking during the audition,

I think it was during the fitting... she said she was thinking about giving a performance that would surpass her opponent. That really struck a chord with me. I'm lucky enough to get to take many auditions myself, but I get so nervous that I end up putting a lot of pressure on myself.
And of course, because they are such wonderful works, I start worrying if I'll be the one to...
drag the project down, or if I can do it well, or if I'll be a burden to my co-stars.
